title: Checkmarx Scan Result
description: A security scan result representing a vulnerability or finding detected by Checkmarx scanning engines (SAST, SCA, KICS) across static code analysis, open source dependency analysis, and infrastructure-as-code scanning.

id.description: Unique identifier for the scan result

similarityId.description: Stable identifier for tracking the same finding across multiple scans

scanId.description: Identifier of the scan that produced this result

projectId.description: Identifier of the project being scanned

type.description: The scanning engine that detected this finding

status.description: Whether the finding is newly detected or recurring from previous scans

state.description: Triage state indicating how the finding has been evaluated

description.description: Human-readable description of the vulnerability or finding

queryName.description: Name of the SAST query or rule that detected the finding

queryGroup.description: Category or group the detecting query belongs to

languageName.description: Programming language of the scanned source code

codeFlow.description: Ordered list of code flow nodes showing the data flow path from source to sink (SAST findings)

firstFoundAt.description: Timestamp when this finding was first detected

foundAt.description: Timestamp when this finding was detected in the current scan

comments.description: Triage comments added by security reviewers

VulnerabilityDetails.description: Detailed vulnerability classification and scoring information

compliances.description: Compliance standards this finding relates to (e.g., OWASP Top 10, PCI DSS)

Location.description: Source code location where the finding was detected

line.description: Line number in the source file

column.description: Column number in the source line

fullName.description: Fully qualified name of the element containing the finding

CodeFlowNode.description: A node in the data flow path showing how tainted data travels through the code

methodLine.description: Starting line of the containing method

PackageData.description: Open source package information for SCA findings

packageRepository.description: Package ecosystem (npm, maven, nuget, pypi, etc.)

recommendedVersion.description: Recommended version that fixes the vulnerability

isDirectDependency.description: Whether the package is a direct dependency or transitive

Comment.description: A triage comment added to a finding
